element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Basic offense; travels max half screen height
Area-of-effect offense; limited stock requiring collection
Dropped by zeppelins; close-range high damage
Larger naval targets with increased firepower
Increases plane velocity; risk/reward of speed
Three in sequence increases firepower; fourth+ grants points
Arcade-standard difficulty escalation on loop replay

typical_relief_triggers: Collecting power-ups to restore firepower after hit
Brief scrolling lulls between major enemy groups
typical_tension_triggers: Constant vertical scrolling (scenery never stops until airport)
Dense enemy fire from battleships and artillery
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Relentless constant-scroll vertical shmup with escalating enemy density; tension primarily driven by unceasing forward momentum and punishing hit feedback rather than cyclical pacing

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introductory enemy types (tanks) with manageable firepower and spacing; weapons pickups help establish baseline offense
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Battleships and kamikazes introduce sustained pressure and evasion requirements; weapon variety available but firepower loss penalty creates vulnerability windows
difficulty_curve.late_game: Artillery and combined force layouts with denser bullet patterns; final loop restarts with increased difficulty and denser projectiles
notable_spikes: Kamikaze monoplane introduction (requires new evasion patterns)
Loop 2+ restarts with increased enemy fire density
Final stage before loop (peak difficulty before restart)

notable_level_patterns.description: Ten stages with airport checkpoints; arcade version allows mid-stage respawning at checkpoint or immediate death location (configurable). Constant scrolling until checkpoint prevents backtracking.
Ground threats (tanks) → Naval threats (battleships) → Air threats (kamikazes) → Integrated multi-type formations; gradually adds new threat vectors
Three upgradeable weapon variants (wide, laser, flamethrower) available as drops; three P-icons grant one firepower level; visual distinction by color encourages active choice
Hit penalty resets firepower and speed to base state; encourages careful play and creates high-stakes moments. Loop system increases base enemy density each cycle.
